ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set marks associated with this group as a string, for example: '>?!'. Use a space for unmarked tasks. Enable the toggle if this group represents completed tasks.
ast.target: 将与此分组关联的标记设置为字符串，例如：'>?!'。使用空格表示未标记的任务。如果此分组代表已完成的任务，请启用切换开关。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Set marks associated with this group as a string, for example: '>?!'. Use a space for unmarked tasks.
ast.target: 将与此分组关联的标记设置为字符串，例如：'>?!'。使用空格表示未标记的任务。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Text matching this regular expression will be removed. Be careful! Test your expression first. The global flag ('g') is used for a per-line match.
ast.target: 匹配此正则表达式的文本将被移除。请谨慎操作！请先测试您的表达式。全局标志 ('g') 用于逐行匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Test your regex: enter sample text to see what will be removed
ast.target: 测试您的正则表达式：输入示例文本以查看将被移除的内容

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: A right-click menu item will be added for each mark in the group.
ast.target: 将为分组中的每个标记添加一个右键菜单项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Marked tasks will be collected and moved under the specified heading. Task collection for a group only occurs when an area heading is configured.
ast.target: 标记的任务将被收集并移动到指定的标题下。仅当配置了区域标题时，才会进行分组的任务收集。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When a task is collected, remove the checkbox
ast.target: 当任务被收集时，移除复选框

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 注册 '(TC) 标记为...' 命令

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 添加 '(TC) 标记为...' 菜单项

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: This is a special group that supports appending text to arbitrary lines of text
ast.target: 这是一个特殊分组，支持向任意文本行追加文本

ast.name: setTooltip
ast.source: If enabled, this group represents completed items. Completed items appear in the top row of the selection menu.
ast.target: 如果启用，此分组代表已完成的项目。已完成的项目将显示在选择菜单的顶部行。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Updated live preview settings; restart Obsidian to apply changes.
ast.target: 已更新实时预览设置；请重启 Obsidian 以应用更改。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Enable task collection (additional task group settings when enabled)
ast.target: 启用任务收集（启用后显示额外的任务分组设置）

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Specify characters (as a string) for previous/next commands. Use the button to include checkbox removal in the cycle.
ast.target: 为上一个/下一个命令指定字符（作为字符串）。使用按钮可在循环中包含复选框移除。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Converts non-list lines when marking tasks
ast.target: 标记任务时转换非列表行

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When collecting tasks, skip content of sections that match the specified pattern
ast.target: 收集任务时，跳过与指定模式匹配的章节内容

ast.name: desc
ast.source: When you click a checkbox, display a panel that allows you to select (with mouse or keyboard) the value to assign.
ast.target: 当您点击复选框时，显示一个面板，允许您（使用鼠标或键盘）选择要分配的值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add an item to the right-click menu to mark the task on the current line (or within the current selection). This menu item will trigger a quick pop-up modal to select the desired mark value.
ast.target: 在右键菜单中添加一个项目，用于标记当前行（或当前选区内）的任务。此菜单项将触发一个快速弹出模态框，以选择所需的标记值。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add an item to the right-click menu to collect tasks (based on task configuration).
ast.target: 在右键菜单中添加一个项目，用于收集任务（基于任务配置）。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Add a command and an item to the right-click menu to reset/clear all tasks in the current file.
ast.target: 添加一个命令和右键菜单项，用于重置/清除当前文件中的所有任务。

ast.name: desc
ast.source: Hide pop-up notification messages (messages will be logged in the developer console)
ast.target: 隐藏弹出通知消息（消息将记录在开发者控制台中）

ast.name: name
ast.source: Click handling: prompt when the checkbox is clicked
ast.target: 点击处理：点击复选框时提示

ast.name: name
ast.target: 添加 '(TC) 标记任务' 菜单项

ast.name: name
ast.target: 添加 '(TC) 收集任务' 菜单项

ast.name: name
ast.source: Add '(TC) Reset all tasks' command and menu item
ast.target: 添加 '(TC) 重置所有任务' 命令和菜单项

ast.name: text
ast.source: Task collector configures tasks in groups. Each group can be associated with one or more task marks ('x' or '>'). The default group configuration will apply to any mark not otherwise assigned to a group.
ast.target: 任务收集器按分组配置任务。每个分组可以关联一个或多个任务标记（'x' 或 '>'）。默认分组配置将应用于任何未分配给其他分组的标记。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Marks that you define within the following groups appear in the selection modal. Those marks that 'complete' a task will appear in the top row.
ast.target: 您在以下分组中定义的标记将出现在选择模态框中。那些“完成”任务的标记将显示在顶部行。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Task Collector creates commands that can be bound to hotkeys or accessed using slash commands for marking tasks. The following settings add right click context menu items for those commands.
ast.target: 任务收集器创建的命令可以绑定到快捷键或通过斜杠命令访问，用于标记任务。以下设置为这些命令添加右键上下文菜单项。
